description_long: This is a single-story residential house set within a fenced yard, featuring a large driveway, a detached garage, and a spacious lawn with landscaping elements such as trees and shrubs. The main building has a hip roof and a modern, clean-lined facade with a mix of white and light gray exterior walls. The property includes a covered patio area, a secondary structure (likely a gazebo or pavilion) in the backyard, and a paved walkway leading to the front door. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a combination of standard and larger panes, providing ample natural light to the interior. The entryway is marked by a simple, flat-roofed overhang and a paved approach, with minimal decorative elements. The overall layout is open and functional, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story house with a hip roof, detached garage, landscaped yard, and asymmetrical windows, set within a fenced property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, detached garage, and landscaped front yard with a tree and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, gazebo/pavilion, large lawn, and the back of the house with patio area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the hip roof, rear patio, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the side facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the secondary structure, side yard, and the paved walkway leading to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entry with a flat-roofed overhang, paved approach, and minimal decorative elements
